## Checklist

- [ ] DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`) included
- [ ] Unit or e2e tests added
- [ ] `make lint` green
- [ ] `make test` green
- [ ] RFC or CHANGELOG entry added when the public API changes
- [ ] Docs updated (when applicable)
